description: CompositionBlack short skirt made of 100% silk with a 100% polyester lining, smocked elasticated waistline and slouchy pockets on the frontFittingRegularWash careCold hand wash separatelyDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDrip dry in shadeCool iron on reverse sideDry cleanableTake feminine dressing to the next level in this short black skirt from forever new. Drown into its silky softness as you paint the town red in it. Team it with a strappy top and ballerinas for a look that screams adorable!Model statisticsHeight-5'9”, Waist – 26.5”, Hips – 37”
